Is it, it basically like, increases your lactate threshold." Taylor Williams, "Saturday Morning Coffee Talk 3/14/2026" (2026-03-14, 01:18:16.280, https://youtu.be/JC1poI1OEog): "it will increase the threshold to which your body will start to build up lactic acid, which makes it good for endurance, makes it good for weightlifting, and you definitely don't get as sore." Hunter Williams, "Reader Mailbag · Episode 1" (2026-04-20, 33:46, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/reader-mailbag-episode-1--31ea7a1b/): "the Transderma does work pretty well." Taylor Williams, "Saturday Morning Coffee Talk 3/14/2026" (2026-03-14, 01:18:24.360, https://youtu.be/JC1poI1OEog): "I've actually been using the transdermal one lately, and that's worked to me just as well, I think, as the injectable milligram for milligram."
reset_biology_synthesis.cross_expert_disagreement: Hunter Williams, "How DADA Enhances Performance My Comprehensive Breakdown" (2026-03-29, 8:15, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/how-dada-enhances-performance-my-comprehensive-breakdown--038a6feb/): "The oral ones tend to not be as strong. I tried both and I think the oral one I didn't really notice that much of an effect. And I was trying like 150 milligrams, the 200 milligrams of the oral, and I didn't really notice that much effect, but the injected one was pretty strong." Hunter Williams, "Reader Mailbag · Episode 1" (2026-04-20, 33:46, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/reader-mailbag-episode-1--31ea7a1b/): "The oral works pretty good too I like injecting the DADA, but the Transderma does work pretty well."

acute.dose: Hunter Williams, "DADA — The Underrated Performance Enhancer" (2026-03-06, threadId 19cc568b0b452c4f, https://open.spotify.com/episode/0uRxClDt9iiUkqSK3BOc9R): "Start: 50 mg/day · Standard performance dose: 100 mg/day." Hunter Williams, "How DADA Enhances Performance My Comprehensive Breakdown" (2026-03-29, 8:45, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/how-dada-enhances-performance-my-comprehensive-breakdown--038a6feb/): "200 milligrams per day is the upper limit." Hunter Williams, "How DADA Enhances Performance My Comprehensive Breakdown" (2026-03-29, 8:15, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/how-dada-enhances-performance-my-comprehensive-breakdown--038a6feb/): "I was trying like 150 milligrams, the 200 milligrams of the oral, and I didn't really notice that much effect."
acute.route: Hunter Williams, "How DADA Enhances Performance My Comprehensive Breakdown" (2026-03-29, 8:15, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/how-dada-enhances-performance-my-comprehensive-breakdown--038a6feb/): "What I would start at is 50 milligrams per day and inject it intramuscularly. I recommend injecting this." Hunter Williams, "Reader Mailbag · Episode 1" (2026-04-20, 33:46, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/reader-mailbag-episode-1--31ea7a1b/): "The oral works pretty good too I like injecting the DADA, but the Transderma does work pretty well."
acute.frequency: Hunter Williams, "May 2026 Q&A | Retatrutide, Testosterone, Autoimmune, and Beyond" (2026-06-17, 44:01, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/may-2026-qa-retatrutide-testosterone-autoimmune-and-beyond--ea9ba352/): "So do it two or three time per week but you don't need to do every day in my opinion."
acute.duration: Hunter Williams, "How DADA Enhances Performance My Comprehensive Breakdown" (2026-03-29, 9:19, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/how-dada-enhances-performance-my-comprehensive-breakdown--038a6feb/): "right now I'm just going off a cycle of four to six weeks for this followed by like a two to four week break just to prevent any peripheral side effects like peripheral neuropathy."
